texto: Jesus was not just a man filled with the baptism of the Holy Spirit, or blessed with the presence of God, like the prophets of the Old Testament. The fullnesss of that wonderful presence of the Lord's Spirit Being, not just a part of it, was incarnated in the body of Jesus Christ and flowed out from Him.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a S. G. Norris: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a fe. O trecho “Jesus was not just a man filled with the baptism of the Holy Spirit, or blessed with the presence…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, apostolic-church, christianity pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de christianity e god.
